<p class="key-answer" data-question="Zidovudine 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Zidovudine</strong> 目前有 <strong>9 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Zidovudine 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Combivir is indicated in antiretroviral combination therapy for the treatment of Human Immunodeficiency Virus (HIV) infection.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HIV infectious disease（100.0%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（100.0%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（100.0%）</li>
<li>AIDS（99.7%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（99.6%）</li>
<li>AIDS related complex（99.2%）</li>
<li>congenital human immunodeficiency virus（99.2%）</li>
<li>fibroma of prostate（96.4%）</li>
<li>Brenner tumor（96.2%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（96.2%）</li>
<li>benign reproductive system neoplasm（96.2%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（96.0%）</li>
<li>chronic hepatitis C virus infection（95.8%）</li>
<li>benign prostate phyllodes tumor（95.8%）</li>
<li>male reproductive organ cancer（95.0%）</li>
<li>prostate leiomyoma（94.5%）</li>
<li>prostate cancer/brain cancer susceptibility（94.3%）</li>
<li>cholecystolithiasis（93.4%）</li>
<li>hepatitis B virus infection（91.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/zidovudine/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
